## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing partnership between Engine.com and GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Engine.com seeks to improve content strategy, potentially replacing current SEO agency (Graphite)](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai offers a two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint followed by execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [James wants to accelerate timeline, aiming to replace Graphite by end of month 1 or 2](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Multiple content opportunities identified: core B2B travel, new weddings vertical, upcoming charge card launch](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Topics

### Engine.com's Current Content Situation

  - [Paying "ungodly amount" to SEO agency Graphite (\~$25k/month)](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Producing 18 pieces of content monthly, quality deemed "fine" but not unique](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Content hasn't been impactful; many posts outdated (e.g., 6-year-old content)](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Using Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

### Engine.com's Business Overview

  - [Core product: Business travel platform for SMB/mid-market, focus on blue-collar industries](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Revenue from hotel booking take rates](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Recently launched groups product, unexpectedly strong in weddings vertical](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Upcoming charge card launch (September) for expense management](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Offering

  - [Two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint + execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team includes editor-in-chief, senior editor, writers, designers, AI engineer](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Capabilities: content audit, strategy development, content creation, SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Success cases shared (e.g., Gallo AI, showing traffic growth)](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### Accelerated Timeline Discussion

  - [James expressed desire to move faster due to interim position and upcoming product launches](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
  - [Marcel suggested possibility of condensing 8-week strategy sprint to 4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Goal: Replace Graphite by end of month 1 or 2 at the latest](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)

### Content Opportunities & Challenges

  - [Refresh existing content (e.g., outdated "What is a B2B Sales Rep?" article)](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Develop verticalized content for core industries (construction, healthcare, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Create content for new weddings vertical (potentially on separate domain)](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Prepare content for upcoming charge card launch (September)](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Address seasonality for wedding-related content](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send SLW (Statement of Work) within the next hour](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [James to review SLW and confirm engagement](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1855.0)
  - [Aim for kickoff on the Monday after next](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
  - [James to provide access to existing content, Gong call recordings, and other relevant materials](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Discuss potential separate engagement for weddings vertical content](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [James to text Marcel his contact number](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [Potential in-person meeting on Wednesday if James visits San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/8-CMM_FvUDVHLCD3EpWMA2bsT844z2qX?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
